title: phyllanthus paxii
intro: Phyllanthus paxii, also known as the Chien-Chih or Chien-shih, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Chinese medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus paxii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and support liver function, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. Phyllanthus paxii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
